mapper.select: SELECT id, requester_id, addressee_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM connection WHERE (requester_id = #{userId} OR addressee_id = #{userId}) AND status = 'ACCEPTED' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, requester_id, addressee_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM connection WHERE addressee_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO connection (requester_id, addressee_id, status) VALUES (#{requesterId}, #{addresseeId}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connection WHERE (requester_id = #{userId} OR addressee_id = #{userId}) AND status = 'ACCEPTED'
